response.global_analysis: The audio is a live performance of '#Kyurulun Daisakusen' by Hololive 3rd Generation. The Reference JSON lyrics were null, so I relied on on-screen text and clear audio for transcription. The subtitles cover member intros and the full song performance in this segment. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal bursts, ensuring tight wrap-around without overlapping into subsequent lines.

subtitles.original: こんぺこ！ 兎田ぺこらぺこ！
subtitles.english: Kon-peko! Usada Pekora-peko!

subtitles.original: 不知火フレアだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm Shiranui Flare!

subtitles.original: こんまっする！ 白銀ノエルです！
subtitles.english: Kon-massuru! I'm Shirogane Noel!

subtitles.original: Ahoy! 宝鐘マリンです！
subtitles.english: Ahoy! I'm Houshou Marine!

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 伝説のガールは 欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idols, the legendary girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 笑い合って もっと可愛くなる
subtitles.english: Laughing together, we become even cuter

subtitles.original: Oh yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Oh yeah yeah

subtitles.original: 遠いようでお近付き
subtitles.english: Feeling distant yet getting closer

subtitles.original: 他人なのに家族みたいで
subtitles.english: We're like a family even though we're strangers

subtitles.original: 寝る間も忘れて きゅるるん大作戦
subtitles.english: Forgetting even to sleep, it's Operation Kyurulun

subtitles.original: 喜怒哀楽を分かち合ってさ
subtitles.english: Sharing all our joys and sorrows

subtitles.original: 大きくなっていきたいよね
subtitles.english: We want to keep growing bigger

subtitles.original: でも小さなことも大事にして
subtitles.english: But we'll cherish the little things too

subtitles.original: 一歩ずつ よし一歩ずつだね
subtitles.english: One step at a time, yeah, step by step

subtitles.original: 楽しんでくれるのが嬉しい
subtitles.english: It makes us happy when you're having fun

subtitles.original: 最高のエンターテイナー
subtitles.english: We're the ultimate entertainers

subtitles.original: 後ろまで見えてる？
subtitles.english: Can you see us all the way in the back?

subtitles.original: 画面の向こうも届いてる
subtitles.english: We're reaching you through the screen too

subtitles.original: 光の海を泳ぐの
subtitles.english: Swimming through this sea of light

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 伝説のガールは 欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idols, the legendary girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 愛されたいし 夢だって見たい
subtitles.english: We want to be loved and have dreams,

subtitles.original: 君じゃなきゃやだ
subtitles.english: It has to be you

subtitles.original: 絶好調です！ 狙い撃ちで
subtitles.english: We're in top form! Taking aim...

subtitles.original: 君にウィンク
subtitles.english: And blowing a wink at you!

subtitles.original: やっぱ伝説のガールで めっちゃハッピー
subtitles.english: After all, being legendary girls makes us so happy

subtitles.original: お願いしたいし 応えたいし 叶っちゃう
subtitles.english: We have requests, we want to deliver, and dreams come true

subtitles.original: 先頭走る 勿論君と
subtitles.english: Running at the front, of course with you

subtitles.original: 笑い合って もっと可愛くなる
subtitles.english: Laughing together, we become even cuter

subtitles.original: Oh yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Oh yeah yeah

subtitles.original: せっかくだからやり切りたいし
subtitles.english: Since we're here, we want to give it our all

subtitles.original: 乗り越える壁はとてもデカい
subtitles.english: The walls we have to overcome are huge

subtitles.original: 将来有望エンターテイナー
subtitles.english: Promising entertainers of the future

subtitles.original: 君が思ってるよりずっと
subtitles.english: Much more than you might think...

subtitles.original: 君のことを想ってる
subtitles.english: We're thinking of you

subtitles.original: どうかな？ 焦がれた
subtitles.english: How is it? The dream we yearned for...

subtitles.original: 夢には近づけてるかな？
subtitles.english: Are we getting any closer to it?

subtitles.original: 声の限り 頑張れるんだ 聞かせて
subtitles.english: We can do our best as long as we have voices, let us hear you!
One, two, three, four!

subtitles.original: もう最高！ 伝説のガールは 幸せ
subtitles.english: Simply the best! The legendary girls are happy

subtitles.original: 愛されていける のびしろあって
subtitles.english: We can keep being loved, with room for growth,

subtitles.original: 下向くとやだ
subtitles.english: looking down is a no-no

subtitles.original: テンポアップし 続けていく
subtitles.english: Keeping the tempo up and moving forward

subtitles.original: 見たい景色へ
subtitles.english: Toward the scenery we want to see

subtitles.original: 世界に出して！ L-O-V-E
subtitles.english: Show it to the world! L-O-V-E

subtitles.original: 限界呼び覚ませ！ L-O-V-E
subtitles.english: Wake up the limits! L-O-V-E

subtitles.original: 今すぐ達せ！ L-O-V-E
subtitles.english: Reach it right now! L-O-V-E

subtitles.original: 皆で作っていく
subtitles.english: We're building this all together

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 後半戦も 盛り上がっていくぞー！
subtitles.english: Let's keep the excitement going for the second half!

subtitles.original: 君たち！ まだまだ声出せますよねー！
subtitles.english: Everyone! You can still shout louder, right?!
